title: alectryon kangeanensis
intro: Alectryon kangeanensis is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the Java plum or mountain apple. It is a small tree or shrub native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and wounds, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting healing. In herbal preparations, Alectryon kangeanensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
